device_name: Voluson Expert 22, Voluson Expert 20, Voluson Expert 18
company: GE Medical Systems Ultrasound and Primary Care Diagnostics,
intended_use: The device is a general purpose ultrasound system intended for use by qualified and trained healthcare professionals. Specific clinical applications remain the same as previously cleared: Fetal/OB; Ab
intended_use_full: The device is a general purpose ultrasound system intended for use by qualified and trained healthcare professionals. Specific clinical applications remain the same as previously cleared: Fetal/OB; Abdominal (including GYN, pelvic and infertility monitoring/follicle development); Pediatric; Small Organ (breast, testes, thyroid etc.); Neonatal and Adult Cephalic; Cardiac (adult and pediatric); Musculo-skeletal Conventional and Superficial; Vascular; Transvaginal (including GYN); Transrectal
target_condition: Obstetric/gynecological imaging including fetal assessment, pelvic floor dysfunction evaluation, and fibroid assessment
ground_truth: Assessment by internal and external clinical experts following defined protocols; for SonoLyst, sorted and graded by 5-sonographer review panel for reference standard
other_metrics: SonoPelvicFloor2.0: 96% accuracy (good IQ), 93% accuracy (challenging IQ), 70% or higher success rate (good IQ), 60% or higher success rate (challenging IQ). Success rates by phase: Rest 100%, Contraction 93.75%, Valsalva 96.55%. Fibroid Mapping primary verification: Uterus 95%, Endometrium 89%, Fibroids 88%. Secondary evaluation: Uterus 100%, Endometrium 91%, Fibroids 88%. DICE scores: Uterus 0.89±0.03, Endometrium 0.70±0.18, Fibroids 0.70±0.13. SonoLyst/SonoLyst Live: 80% or higher success rate.
